### 👉 Offbeat

Location: Jane Bond @ [5 Princess St W, Waterloo, ON](https://www.google.com/maps/place/5+Princess+St+W,+Waterloo,+ON)

#### 10pm-late

* [Paun](https://www.instagram.com/artbyzigzag/)
* [Danasonic](https://www.instagram.com/danasonic_)

[Info](https://www.instagram.com/p/DXPTJJhkdwR/)
